occurrence_sentence: D-Wave Quantum Inc. announced that the 1,200+ qubit Advantage2 prototype is now available via the company's Leap real-time quantum cloud service.

PRESS RELEASE — [D-Wave Quantum Inc.](https://cts.businesswire.com/ct/CT?id=smartlink&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dwavesys.com%2F&esheet=52815740&lan=en-US&anchor=D-Wave+Quantum+Inc.&index=1&md5=0ed01d1bab586720bd5e928db7428557) (NYSE: QBTS) ("D-Wave"), a leader in quantum computing systems, software, and services and the world's first commercial supplier of quantum computers, today announced that the 1,200+ qubit Advantage2 prototype is now available via the company's Leap real-time quantum cloud service.

occurrence_sentence: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE: QBTS) ("D-Wave"), a leader in quantum computing systems, software, and services and the world's first commercial supplier of quantum computers, today announced that the 1,200+ qubit Advantage2 prototype is now available via the company's Leap real-time quantum cloud service.

"Quality is important. The new Advantage2 prototype is about radical increases in qubit quality, which significantly expands our ability to apply D-Wave technology to ever more complex optimization challenges," said Ed Heinbockel, president and CEO of SavantX.
